anxiety: Try a breathing exercise: inhale for 4 seconds, hold for 4, exhale for 4.
Focus on your surroundings using the 5-4-3-2-1 grounding technique.
Remind yourself that this feeling will pass, even if it feels intense right now.
sadness: Talking to someone you trust can really help.
Try doing something small that you enjoy today.
It’s okay to feel this way—give yourself some time and kindness.
anger: Take a few deep breaths before reacting.
Step away from the situation for a moment if possible.
Try to pause and reflect before responding—it can help prevent regret later.
joy: That’s great to hear! Keep doing what makes you feel good.
It’s nice to see you feeling this way—hold onto that moment.
neutral: Sometimes just checking in with yourself is a great first step.
Take a moment to breathe and reflect on how you're really feeling.
It's okay to just be — not every moment needs to have a strong emotion attached.
